creator: dmlb@ragnet.demon.co.uk
text:
man page for sh(1) does not document flags "-" and "--".
        First use noticed in /etc/daily, /etc/weekly, /etc/monthly
	as #!/bin/sh - but not mentioned in manual page.
	Source code (src/sh/options.c line 165) gives
	 break;    /* "-" or  "--" terminates options */

Fix: 

Update man page
